column1: Hey max, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book?
Bet! Grand O is lit for sure. I'll send the info
How many ppl in your group so far?
Word that's solid. Which school you all from? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
Oh gas! will def hook it up y'all know how to party for sure lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
I'd like to see the package offers first
morning man sorry I knocked. I got you tho
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if you got it
bett lmk what the squad thinks
yoo Max whats good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
aight bet. we had a few dates your week sell out so just wanted to give a heads up before it fully does
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
unsure should be able to discuss tmrw
cool lmk bro, availability is super low don't want you guys missing out
How much would it be if its only three people
we'd have to do the 18-23rd for grand o, other dates your week are sold out, here's a sample quote for 5 nights https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/HXMFTDDSDP
dates are a lil different on there but pricing is good for the 18-23rd (5 nights)
We need to be back at school on the 23, any chance you have availability for the 17-22
Nahh unfortunately we don't bro, we could do a 4 night stay? the 18-22nd
Ok can I get a quote for that, we looking for a fourth but may not be possible under the time constraints
yea pricing is the same as the other 4 night stay arrangements I sent over
hey did you want to book the 18-22nd?
we think so, we will book tomorrow
ok bet lmk, we can check tomorrow and see if we have any rooms left
ok wait we can actually book today, three people 4 nights
Bet will set this up right now, 3 people 18-22nd
just emailed that over, lmk if anyone needs help navigating it
yoo, whenever you guys can if you could upload your flight info, that way we can schedule your airport transfers

Hi Spiffy, considering what's going on in Mexico right now some members of our group are uncomfortable with the current plan. We were wondering if there is anyway to switch our reservation to the Occidental resort in Punta Cana. We would love to know what that package would look like and if not what a refund policy would be for a situation like this
Hey bro, totally understand the concern. at the moment there's no travel ban in place for Cancun and resorts are operating normally. we can definitely look into Punta Cana tho if interested
looking into it now to see what phase operations team is currently with your reservation. from there we'll know what the price difference or options will be

hey brother, so looks like your reservation as already been submitted and paid for for Grand Oasis Cancun. at the moment we're offering any of our travelers that want to switch to Punta Cana a revised rate of $400 for the 4 night stay
I can help coordinate that if you want to move in that direction
That's an extra 400 a person? Is there any way for us to get our money back from the Grand Oasis

youre still in the window to add the Cancel for any Reason travel protection insurance with Travel Insured since you just booked. if you add that in we can process cancellation and you can submit a claim for a refund through their platform
heres the link to do so https://www.travelinsured.com/agency/
So our plan rn is to buy insurance, cancel and then book Punta Cana for 400
Is Punta Cana free the same days

Look, it doesn't seem like we are going to be able to go to cancun and are interested in Punta Cana for 400. We are unable to do the insurance plan. I'm uncomfortable buying insurance knowing that i'm going to cancel. Is there anyway for you to resell our room and give us some money back?

Max whats up brother. Apologies on missing your text last night. So, we arent able to resell your room since the reservation is paid for and confirmed. There arent any changes or adjustments we can make on it

The insurance is in place specifically for cancellations within the window of purchase. since youre still in that window, everything will be fine if you add the policy to your purchase and cancel afterward

As for the Punta Cana discount offer, it would have to be either or. Either you follow through with cancellation and file a claim through insurance for a refund, or we keep it active and proceed with the Punta Cana discount reservation for 4 nights
If we're gonna do Punta Cana, we'll need to make the move by tomorrow afternoon. Things have been selling out there so I want to make sure we can make it happen for you
can we see the punta cana package, that's likely what we will do
yea I'll send you a sample quote page right now just so you can see
Bet will send this over in a few
Did you want to go the route of cancelling your Cancun trip first? With insurance
No, I’m just switching with the discount. My parents does not feel right about using the insurance that way.
No worries, totally up to your preference. Just thinking of ways for you to save the most $
I'll get this reservation sorted and send over for you
let me know when u send it
Sup bro pardon the delay, will send shortly. I'm seeing that the 400 per person deal was for a room of 4 so trying to see what I can get approved for a room of 3
Hey bro heres your Punta Cana reservation https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/EMWYTKWDTE
On the reservation page you'll see the standard pricing, once you click in to Join Trip you'll see the discounted pricing

Ok here's the deal, there's basically no way to get to punta cana reasonably, we thought we'd be able to transfer our flights but it's either 1.5k or a 12 hour layover. So sorry to put you through all these ups and downs. I think we are willing to go to Cancun unless it gets really bad. we still have our flights and obviously didn't do the insurance cancellation.
Everything for your cancun reservation is active as is
whats good brotha, are Hayden and Kiran on the same flight as you
bet bet will add that in
